widgetData.source_sentence: This image features a woodcut illustration of a grove of trees enclosed within an oval frame. The trees, which appear to be a mix of deciduous and coniferous varieties, stand on a grassy bank beside a body of water. The scene is framed by architectural elements and inscribed with text in Latin, French, and German.

A formal group portrait set in a landscape featuring four figures: a seated man on the left, a young boy seated beside him, and a standing couple on the right. The man on the left wears a dark robe and white collar, while the standing man wears a similar dark garment with a wide white collar and gestures with his right hand. The standing woman wears a light-colored dress with puffed sleeves and holds a hat in her left hand. The background shows trees, a distant landscape, and a cloudy sky.

A dramatic interior scene illuminated by a strong light source from the right, depicting a group of figures gathered around a central seated woman. To the left, a robed figure gestures emphatically towards a large sheet of paper held up by a standing man, while a child and another figure observe from the floor. The background features a wall adorned with several framed portraits or prints, suggesting an artist's studio or a place of learning.
sentences: human figure at (open) window, seen from inside
finger and string games (cat's cradle, etc.)

widgetData.source_sentence: A monochromatic still life composition featuring a collection of kitchen and market items arranged on a wooden ledge against a dark background. A large, woven wicker basket stands upright in the center, flanked by a large head of cabbage on the left and a plucked fowl on the right. A small ceramic pot with a lid sits behind the bird, and a long, curved gourd or vegetable rests horizontally across the foreground.

An engraving depicts a dramatic nocturnal scene where a man in period clothing stands on a burning ladder, reaching up to assist a young boy who is climbing down from a high window. The ladder is engulfed in flames at its base, creating a sense of peril, while the boy looks down with a calm expression. In the background, a cityscape is visible under a night sky featuring a radiant sun or moon.
sentences: the vision of the smoking furnace and the burning lamp in the night ~ Abraham's sacrifice
the dream of Jacob: while sleeping on the ground with a stone for pillow Jacob sees a ladder reaching from earth to heaven with angels going up and down; usually with God at the top of the ladder
